---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new monitor, channel, tool, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem would this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see. If it's a new monitor / notification channel / remediation
tool, mention which module it would live in.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, or references.
